data.body:
[verification evidence — AC: guards fire in a real workflow_dispatch run] Both aborts confirmed on navapbc/rebar's live release.yml; NO build/publish/tag job ran (all skipped), so no PyPI/MCP-registry/GitHub-Release side effect:

(i) Non-main ref — run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29464905367 (ref test/fd84-guardfire, version=0.7.1). Authorize job FAILED at 'Guard — dispatch must run from refs/heads/main': '##[error]release must be dispatched from refs/heads/main (got: refs/heads/test/fd84-guardfire)'. Build/wheel_test/sdist_test/publish/github_release/mcp_registry/consolidate = SKIPPED.

(ii) Mismatched version on main — run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29464912566 (ref main, version=9.9.9). Ref guard passed; Authorize FAILED at 'Guard — version lockstep': 'release_guards: pyproject version 0.7.1 != release version 9.9.9' (+ server.json + packages[0]). All build/publish/tag jobs = SKIPPED.

(Throwaway branch test/fd84-guardfire deleted post-verification.)
